content: {"file": "node_modules/@angular/core/fesm2022/core.mjs", "summary": "This file contains Angular core utilities and decorators for creating components, services, pipes, etc. It includes functions to create metadata constructors, make decorators, param decorators, prop decorators, and handle development mode configurations.", "rules": [{"name": "Create Decorator", "description": "Creates a decorator factory with given name, properties, parent class, additional processing function, and type function.", "conditions": ["makeDecorator"], "actions": ["return noSideEffects(() => {...})"]}, {"name": "Make Metadata Constructor", "description": "Returns a metadata constructor based on the provided properties.", "conditions": ["makeMetadataCtor"], "actions": ["return function ctor(...args) {...}"]}], "dependencies": ["globalThis", "typeof location !== 'undefined'", "Object.defineProperty"]}
